case_title: NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COLLECTION SERVICE, INC VS. INFINITE BUILDERS GROUP, INC. A CALIFORNIA ET AL

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COLLECTION SERVICE, INC AS TO DEFENDANT INFINITE BUILDERS GROUP, INC.
